{{Quote|I have Duke Sparbo transmitting on my fifth cranial band. Shall I take a message?|CZ-54|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''CZ-54''' was a [[CZ-series secretary/comm droid]] that was manufactured by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]]. He was employed by the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]], and once dealt with [[Duke/Legends|Duke]] [[Sparbo]].

==Sources==
